description: Acceptance rubric the guardian applies before a docs-writing deliverable is declared done.

dimensions.criterion: Exactly one route read and executed; topic matches the request; no two playbooks mixed.
Discover -> Analyze -> Execute -> Validate all ran; Validate not skipped.
One tag family per document; every non-obvious claim tagged; every [SUPUESTO] paired with a verification step.
The routed playbook's own Quality Criteria all checkable (e.g. spec lints clean, breaking changes have migration notes, BLUF answers the ask).
No invented prices (FTE-months only); never green-as-success without evidence; no client PII; single brand.
Reader can act from the output alone; examples are realistic and redacted.
